rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence patterns for stateful equations
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Generate assumptions and guarantees that reference visible inputs and outputs only
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
Assumptions and guarantees should align with the actual types of referenced features
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Component type contracts must not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not reference Boolean data ports as integers or use opaque data in range comparisons
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
